use_cases: Navigation menus with hierarchical submenu options
User account settings and preferences dropdowns
Action menus for content items in dashboards
Form input selection with categorized options
Filtering and sorting controls in data tables
ai_summary: A Radix UI-based dropdown menu component providing accessible, animated navigation overlays with support for submenus, radio groups, checkable items, and inset styling. Built with Tailwind CSS for clean, minimal styling with smooth open/close animations and keyboard navigation support.
